overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from No Man's Sky showing an astronaut character standing on a circular metal platform at night next to a glowing orange beacon. A spaceship with bright green exhaust trails flies overhead across a starry nebula sky as the camera pans to follow its trajectory.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular platform with glowing beacon on alien glacier

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on the platform facing the glowing orange beacon

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure emitting bright orange light from a vertical slit
dark metallic circular platform with gold trim where the character stands
alien landscape with blue-white snow and rocky formations under starlight
dark sky filled with stars and blue-green nebula clouds

segments.scene_description: The character stands motionless on a circular metal platform atop an alien glacier at night. A glowing orange beacon illuminates the immediate area while the starry sky with nebula clouds fills the background. The environment is completely still with no other movement or activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular platform with glowing beacon on alien glacier

events.description: spaceship with bright green exhaust trails enters from the left and flies overhead
camera completes panning right as spaceship exits frame to the right

agents.ego_description: turning to the right to track the spaceship as it flies across the sky

notable_agents.action: spaceship flying horizontally from left to right emitting bright green exhaust trails

segments.scene_description: A spaceship with vivid green exhaust trails suddenly enters from the left, flying low over the platform. The camera pans right to follow the ship's trajectory across the starry sky until it exits to the right. The character turns to watch the ship pass, while the glowing beacon and icy terrain remain constant in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a moment of stillness on a frozen alien world that is suddenly interrupted by the high-speed passage of a spacecraft. It begins with a motionless character standing on a circular metal platform atop a dark glacier, where a glowing orange beacon casts light against a backdrop of starry nebula clouds. As a spaceship suddenly enters from the left with vivid green exhaust trails, the camera pans right to track its low-altitude trajectory across the sky. The character turns in synchronization with the camera's movement to watch the vessel pass, while the icy terrain and beacon remain constant in the background. The scene finally settles as the ship exits the frame to the right, leaving the silent, starry expanse once again.
